properties.name: routeTableId
properties.description: The ID of the route table

properties.name: routes
properties.description: The routes in the route table

properties.name: associations
properties.description: The associations between the route table and subnets or gateways

properties.name: ownerId
properties.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the route table

properties.name: tags
properties.description: Any tags assigned to the route table
